.. _meanplot:

meanplot
========

**inherit_from**: ['plot']

Summary
-------

+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|keyword                      |default                      |attribute                    |value                        |
+=============================+=============================+=============================+=============================+
|**colorbar_title**           |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*lowercase*                  |False                        |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*optional*                   |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**comment**                  |[]                           |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*alias*                      |annotate                     |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |                             |decorator                    |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**curve**                    |                             |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*alias*                      |curves                       |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*type*                       |curve                        |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**datahook**                 |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*optional*                   |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**display_last_curve_value** |False                        |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**graphics**                 |                             |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*type*                       |vertgraphics                 |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**has_legend**               |True                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**has_title**                |True                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**has_xtitle**               |False                        |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**has_ytitle**               |True                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**legend**                   |                             |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*type*                       |plotlegend                   |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**plotdata**                 |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*optional*                   |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**sort**                     |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*validate*                   |ValidateChoice               |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |                             |None                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |                             |increasing                   |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |                             |decreasing                   |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |                             |rank_increasing              |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |                             |rank_decreasing              |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**title**                    |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*lowercase*                  |False                        |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*optional*                   |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**title_font**               |                             |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*type*                       |plotfont                     |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**xaxis**                    |                             |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*alias*                      |x_axis                       |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*type*                       |axis                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**xtitle**                   |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*lowercase*                  |False                        |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*optional*                   |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**yaxis**                    |                             |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*alias*                      |y_axis                       |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*type*                       |axis                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|**ytitle**                   |None                         |                             |                             |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*lowercase*                  |False                        |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*optional*                   |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
|                             |                             |*unique*                     |True                         |
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+
+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+-----------------------------+

Keywords
--------

colorbar_title
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

A string specifying the text template to use for the title of the colormap

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

comment
^^^^^^^

default: **""**

A directive specifying special annotations on the plot (commentline, commenttext)

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |annotate                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |decorator                                        |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

curve
^^^^^

default: **""**

A list of directives of type line, bar, dot etc...

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |curves                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |curve                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

datahook
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

This is a callable which is called for each set of data retrieved / computed during the production of the plot. This is particularly handy for printing out values etc... A standard datahook is provided, it is called printhook

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

display_last_curve_value
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

if set to True, the floating point value of the last point of the curve is displayed on the right hand side of the plot

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

graphics
^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

A directive specifying graphics attributes for the plot, these are inherited by curves

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |vertgraphics                                     |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

has_legend
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **True**

Switches the display of the legend on and off

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

has_title
^^^^^^^^^

default: **True**

Switches the display of the plot title on and off

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

has_xtitle
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **False**

Switches the display of the X axis title on and off

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

has_ytitle
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **True**

Switches the display of the Y axis title on and off

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

legend
^^^^^^

default: **""**

A string specifying the text template to use for the legend

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |plotlegend                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

plotdata
^^^^^^^^

default: **None**

A directive specifying meta data for the type of data being plotted (obssdate, odsdata, scoredata, etc...)

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

sort
^^^^

default: **None**

This option is useful when plotting bars. Sometimes we want the bars to be sorted to have increasing or decreasing bars in size and value. The special value None means no sorting.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|validate                                         |ValidateChoice                                   |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |None                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |increasing                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |decreasing                                       |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |rank_increasing                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|                                                 |rank_decreasing                                  |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title
^^^^^

default: **None**

This is a list of strings making the plot title. Each element of the list represents one different line. Plots have default templates for the title, if you would like to only override one line of the title and keep the other lines as the default definition, specify None for the lines which should have the default template.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

title_font
^^^^^^^^^^

default: **""**

A plotfont directive defining different parameters for the font to use for the title

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|type                                             |plotfont                                         |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

xaxis
^^^^^

default: **""**

A directive specifying the characteristics of the X axis

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |x_axis                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |axis                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

xtitle
^^^^^^

default: **None**

A string specifying the text template to use for the title along the X axis.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

yaxis
^^^^^

default: **""**

A directive specifying the characteristics of the Y axis

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|alias                                            |y_axis                                           |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|type                                             |axis                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

ytitle
^^^^^^

default: **None**

A string specifying the text template to use for the title along the Y axis.

+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|attribute                                        |value                                            |
+=================================================+=================================================+
|lowercase                                        |False                                            |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|optional                                         |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+
|unique                                           |True                                             |
+-------------------------------------------------+-------------------------------------------------+

generated on 2012-11-04 20:07:45
